summary.apiTranscript: 13 API IDs have success and negative/idempotency cases with explicit error codes for failing cases.
summary.dbReadback: All P0 DB models have positive readback evidence; mutation APIs map to readback models in docs/auto-execute/db/web/T12/db-readback.json.
summary.mockFallback: Generation proof includes T06 no-AI-key local fallback evidence.
summary.renderer: Render proof includes 1080x1920 local renderer evidence.

repairs.issue: PowerShell blocked pnpm.ps1 during the first verification attempt.
repairs.repair: Reran required pnpm commands through pnpm.cmd, the Windows-safe equivalent.

repairs.issue: apps/web/tests/api/run-api-tests.mjs defaulted to only the foundation suite.
repairs.repair: Changed the default selection to run all API suites.
Added a fail-closed T12 contract checker that writes T12 API transcript, matrix summary, and DB readback evidence.

repairs.issue: Initial checker expected API-010 repeat case name 'idempotent' while existing T07 transcript records 'idempotent repeat'.
repairs.repair: Aligned the checker to the durable transcript case name without reducing required coverage.

rerunResumeState.notes: T12 proves API/DB contract evidence only. T13 still owns whole-app runtime page/API smoke.
